presets.name: Diamond Slow Sweep
presets.description: Gentle holographic rotation across full octahedron array. Starting point for room placement.

presets.name: Diamond Pulse
presets.description: Fast diamond sweep with level detection — spatial width breathes with the mix.

presets.name: Cube Corners
presets.description: 8-corner cube topology at control-room scale. Uniform diagonal coverage for monitoring correction.

presets.name: Cube Tight
presets.description: Tight cube sweep with asymmetric linger. Good for dense mix textures.

presets.name: Cylinder Height Rise
presets.description: Slow vertical sweep between floor and ceiling rings. Dramatic height movement for pads and strings.

presets.name: Cylinder Orbit
presets.description: Medium-speed cylinder orbit with level detection and symmetry warp. Orbiting synth effect.

presets.name: Sphere Uniform
presets.description: Icosahedral sphere at large room scale. Maximum spatial uniformity — no dead zones at any LFO phase.

presets.name: Sphere Reactive
presets.description: Sphere topology with high detect and sensitivity. Spatial image expands and contracts with transients.
